title: Completed drug and health product compliance monitoring projects - Canada.ca
content:
## Completed drug and health product compliance monitoring projects
Once we complete a project, we make the results available to the public. Learn more about the compliance monitoring projects we have conducted to date.
- 2022: Canadian Specific Opioid targeted Risk Management Plans (CSO-tRMPs) for prescription opioid-containing products
- 2019 to 2020: Terms and conditions on drug establishment licences

## Natural health products and over-the-counter products
- 2021 to 2022: Licensed natural health products sold for sexual enhancement
- 2021: Review of ethanol-based hand sanitizers
- 2019 to 2020: Good manufacturing practices for natural health products
- 2019 to 2020: Advance notice of importation process
- 2019 to 2020: Testing of natural health products used for workout purposes
- 2018 to 2019: Good manufacturing practices for natural health products
- 2018: Sunscreen testing
- 2017: Good manufacturing practices for natural health products
- 2015: Testing of natural health products for vulnerable populations
- 2023 to 2024: Wholesalers of prescription in-feed veterinary drugs (commercial feed mills)
- 2019 to 2020: Good manufacturing practices and testing of veterinary products for food-producing animals
- 2018 to 2019: Decorative contact lenses
- 2015 to 2016: Dermal fillers containing hyaluronic acid

## For more information
- Monitoring health products on the Canadian market
